name: Focus Spot 6Z
comment: The ADJ Focus Spot 6Z is a feature-packed, compact moving head spot fixture powered by a 300W cool white LED engine. It is equipped with motorized focus, motorized zoom, motorized Iris, two prisms and two frost filters. It has two GOBO wheels and two color wheels. The rear panel has PowerLock In/Out to daisy chain power, 3-pin and 5-pin DMX In/Out and RJ45 connections.
